metadata.title: StudyFlow — Enterprise Clinical Research Operations Platform
metadata.description: Unify workflows, compliance, participants, and documentation in one enterprise platform built for medical centers.

hero.title: Full Control Over Clinical Research Operations
hero.subtitle: Unify workflows, compliance, participants, and documentation — in one enterprise platform built for medical centers.
hero.description: StudyFlow brings structure and visibility to clinical research by connecting operational management, regulatory processes, and sponsor collaboration in real time.

who.title: Built for Research-Driven Medical Centers
who.subtitle: Designed around the real needs of the people who manage, oversee, and execute clinical research.

hospital.title: Hospital Leadership
hospital.description: Gain visibility and control across all clinical research activity. Monitor compliance, performance, and resource utilization from a single interface.

research.title: Research Units
research.description: Coordinate multi-study operations with structured workflows, participant management, and consistent execution across teams and departments.

finance.title: Finance & Administration
finance.description: Oversee budget alignment, regulatory documentation, and reporting with transparent processes that reduce administrative burden.

problem.title: Clinical Research Is Complex — and Difficult to Control
problem.subtitle: Medical centers face operational challenges that slow down research and reduce institutional oversight.

disconnected.title: Disconnected Systems
disconnected.description: Operations, compliance, and finance run on separate tools with no shared context.

spreadsheet.title: Spreadsheet Dependency
spreadsheet.description: Critical data lives in spreadsheets, creating version conflicts and manual errors.

visibility.title: Limited Visibility
visibility.description: Study progress, bottlenecks, and compliance status are difficult to monitor in real time.

overload.title: Administrative Overload
overload.description: Research teams spend excessive time on coordination tasks instead of research execution.

documents.title: Fragmented Document Workflows
documents.description: Regulatory documents, consent forms, and approvals are managed across disconnected processes.

solution.title: A Unified Operational and Compliance Layer
solution.subtitle: StudyFlow centralizes clinical research management into a single platform — enabling structured workflows, real-time visibility, and consistent execution across all studies.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.description: Transparent collaboration, KPIs, and study pipeline visibility

capabilities.title: Core Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Four integrated pillars that bring structure, compliance, and visibility to clinical research operations.

execution.title: Standardized and Controlled Study Execution
execution.description: Manage the full study lifecycle from setup to closeout with structured, repeatable workflows.

compliance.title: Integrated Compliance & eConsent Layer
compliance.description: Manage regulatory documentation, electronic consent, and digital signatures in a unified compliance environment.

financial.title: Aligned Financial Insight Without Added Complexity
financial.description: Track budgets alongside study activity for transparent institutional oversight.
features: Budget tracking aligned with study activity
Support for accurate billing and reconciliation

irb.title: Towards a Fully Integrated IRB Workflow
irb.description: StudyFlow is evolving to include a complete IRB workflow that connects protocol approval, compliance tracking, and operational execution into a single system.

sponsor.title: A Transparent Interface for Sponsors
sponsor.subtitle: Strengthen sponsor relationships through visibility, structure, and measurable performance.
sponsor.description: StudyFlow enables research sites and medical centers to provide sponsors with a clear, structured, and transparent interface for collaboration — making your center more attractive to sponsor organizations that value punctuality, efficiency, and workflow clarity.
features: Transparent workflow tracking from submission to approval
Defined KPIs across the study lifecycle
Improved communication between sponsors and research teams
sponsor.quote: Increase sponsor confidence through consistency, transparency, and operational clarity.

security.title: Built for Security, Compliance, and Scale
security.subtitle: Built with privacy and compliance in mind from day one.

cloud.title: Secure Cloud Infrastructure
cloud.description: Hosted on enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure with high availability and disaster recovery.

encryption.title: Encryption Everywhere
encryption.description: All data encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256) to protect sensitive research data.

gdpr.title: GDPR-Aligned Data Handling
gdpr.description: Built with privacy-by-design principles and GDPR-aligned data processing practices.

rbac.title: Role-Based Access Control
rbac.description: Granular permission management ensures users access only the data and actions relevant to their role.

audit.title: Audit-Ready Architecture
audit.description: Comprehensive audit trails and logging for full traceability of all system actions and data changes.

outcomes.title: Designed to Improve Efficiency and Control
outcomes.subtitle: Measurable improvements in how medical centers manage and execute clinical research.

items.label: Reduction in Administrative Workload
items.description: Streamline coordination tasks and free research teams to focus on clinical work.

items.label: Faster Stakeholder Coordination
items.description: Improve communication between departments, sponsors, and regulatory bodies.

items.label: Study Visibility
items.description: Real-time dashboards provide complete visibility into study progress and compliance.

items.label: Faster Document Processing
items.description: Integrated eConsent and digital document workflows reduce turnaround times.

cta.title: See StudyFlow in Action
cta.subtitle: Discover how your medical center can gain full control over clinical research operations and compliance.

footer.description: Enterprise platform for clinical research operations, compliance, and sponsor collaboration.

demo.title: Request a Demo
demo.subtitle: See how StudyFlow can transform your clinical research operations.
demo.success: Thank you! Your request has been received.
demo.successSub: Check your inbox for a confirmation email.
demo.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
